channel.title: p(Doom)1 dev blog
channel.description: Development notes from p(Doom)1 - a satirical strategy game about managing an AI safety lab.

item.title: Where the site stands, before the refresh
item.description: A deliberate 'before' snapshot of pdoom1.com at the start of a UI refresh - what's working (the Risk Dashboard), what reads as dated (blanket monospace, no shared layout spine), and the correctness bugs fixed the same day.

item.title: Website Development Sprint Complete: v0.2.0 Major Enhancement
item.description: Completed comprehensive 6-hour development sprint delivering major website enhancements across three phases: game asset integration, blog system overhaul, and UI polish. Transformed the website from a basic landing page into a professional developer showcase.

item.title: Architecture Revolution: From Monolith to Modular Excellence
item.description: A comprehensive look at our systematic approach to breaking down 4,235+ line monoliths into clean, maintainable modules - featuring real metrics and engineering insights from the trenches

item.title: UI Monolith Breakdown Complete - Architecture Transformation
item.description: Completed systematic breakdown of 4,235-line UI monolith into 8 specialized modules, achieving 37.1% reduction with zero functionality regression

item.title: Multi-Repository Integration System Complete
item.description: Completed comprehensive multi-repository integration system establishing professional automation and documentation management across pdoom1, pdoom1-website, and pdoom-data repositories

item.title: p(Doom)1 Website Release - Deployment Infrastructure Complete
item.description: Successfully implemented and documented the complete deployment pipeline for the p(Doom)1 website with GitHub Actions workflow

item.title: Deterministic RNG Foundation Complete
item.description: 268-line comprehensive system for competitive gaming with enhanced deterministic RNG and community challenge features

item.title: Enhanced Leaderboard System v0.4.1
item.description: Enhanced leaderboard system with improved scoring, display features, and competitive gaming infrastructure

item.title: Debug Console System Implementation
item.description: Implemented comprehensive debug console system for enhanced development and troubleshooting capabilities

item.title: v0.3.0 Consolidated Release - Major Bug Fixes & Infrastructure
item.description: Consolidated release featuring critical bug fixes, infrastructure improvements, and enhanced development tooling

item.title: P(Doom) v0.2.12 Release: Development Infrastructure Enhancement
item.description: Major infrastructure milestone featuring comprehensive type annotations and automated blog system implementation

item.title: Type Annotation Sprint: Major Codebase Quality Enhancement
item.description: Intensive type annotation sprint achieving 85-90% coverage across core modules with significant pylance error reduction

item.title: Major Type Annotation Milestone - 4,235 Lines Annotated
item.description: Achieved major milestone with complete type annotation of ui.py (4,235 lines) and significant progress on game_state.py
